name: @dir-ai/voyager-hands
description: Voyager's HANDS: the consent-gated remediation organ. Turns a verified finding into a declarative, reversible action from a known-safe catalog; previews it with a blast-radius; applies ONLY behind a hard consent gate through an injected provider; verifies and auto-rolls-back; and attests. Never free-form, never autonomous on production.
author: dir-ai

scripts.test: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test scripts/run-tests.mjs
